description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2025 BMW Z4 Sdrive 30i, 2.0 I4, RWD, 258bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 229,000 or AED 3,588 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 11,775 KM's - BMW Warranty Valid Until 8th June 2030 or 200,000 KM's - BMW Service Contract Valid Until 8th June 2030 or 100,000 KM's - Full Service History - 2 Keys - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Frozen Grey - Apple Carplay - Cruise Control - Adaptive LED Headlights - Ambient Lighting - Harman Kardon Surround Sound System - Bluetooth Connectivity - M Aerodynamics Package - M Seat Belts - M Leather Steering Wheel - M Sport Suspension - M Sport Brakes, Red High Gloss - Lane Change Assist - Blind Spot Indicator - Adjustable Seats - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Rear View Camera - Front and Rear Parking Sensors
